arts.ttl: Mohamed Salah Liverpool contract latest - Carragher drops update, agent message, lawyer verdict
arts.sum: The latest Liverpool contract news on Mohamed Salah as the Reds are said to have offered their talisman a new deal amid reported interest from the Saudi Pro League

arts.ttl: Raphael Varane left 'surprised' by Marcus Rashford transfer to Aston Villa
arts.sum: Former Manchester United defender Raphael Varane, a teammate of Marcus Rashford at Old Trafford, is pleased to see that the forward has changed his environment as he seeks to rediscover his very best form - but he admits himself surprised that Rashford ended up at Aston Villa. Get the Marcus Rashford Aston Villa shirt

arts.ttl: Aston Villa's worst case scenario vs Liverpool as Unai Emery makes three late calls
arts.sum: Emery has called on Andres Garcia to fill the void at right-back, while he has fellow winter signings Axel Disasi and Marcus Rashford ready to help plug the gaps if Konsa and Bailey aren't in a position to play, but any one of those three doubts could yet make up a part of the squad. Emery wasn't able to confirm, meanwhile, if any of doubtful trio Matty Cash, Ezri Konsa or Leon Bailey would be in a position to make the squad tonight; Cash hobbled off at Wolves, while Konsa limped off against Tottenham in the FA Cup .

arts.ttl: Arsenal and Liverpool 'interested in signing Eintracht Frankfurt striker Hugo Ekitike as Premier League's top two look to bolster attacking ranks'
arts.sum: The 22-year-old French forward has contributed 17 goals and six assists in 32 appearances in all competitions for the Bundesliga outfit so far this season. .

arts.sum: The Reds are back in Premier League action on Wednesday night when they face Aston Villa in the Premier League

arts.ttl: Champions League draw: Who could Liverpool, Arsenal and Aston Villa face in round of 16 following conclusion of the play-offs?
arts.sum: Who could Liverpool , Arsenal and Aston Villa face in the round of 16 having already automatically qualified for that stage by virtue of finishing in the top eight of the initial league phase?

arts.ttl: Unai Emery praises 'unique' Mo Salah as Marcus Rashford told what to do for Aston Villa
arts.sum: The Spaniard said of Salah: "His career has been amazing - I think he's playing his best football. Unai Emery praises 'unique' Mo Salah as Marcus Rashford told what to do for Aston Villa
